name: old-time-radio
description: A website for listening to Old Time Radio hosted by archive.org

scripts.clean: npm run clean:shared && npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p src/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p public/js/tsconfig.json --noEmit

author: Rob Dawson <rob@codebox.net> (http://codebox.net)
